metadata.name: CloudiQS Skills Marketplace
metadata.description: End-to-end skills, commands and plugins for CloudiQS — AWS Advanced Consulting Partner. Alliance motion, opportunity chain, funding stack, Agentic AI SOW, FinOps, delivery, and Agent Bakery GTM. 59 skills · 40 commands · 8 plugins.
metadata.author: CloudiQS (IKSystems Limited)

plugins.name: cloudiqus-toolkit
plugins.description: Foundation — North Star, autonomy rules, lessons, customer context, ACE lifecycle, AI consulting identity. Load first every session.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-outreach
plugins.description: SDR & discovery — cold email hooks, LinkedIn sequences, target research, VMware angle, persona library, outreach metrics.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-commercial
plugins.description: Sales & SOW — opportunity chain, PAIN qualify, alliance motion, Agentic AI SOW, pricing, pipeline, objections, proposals.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-delivery
plugins.description: Technical delivery — FinOps, WAFR, security, migration, onboarding, MSP managed services, incident response.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-aws-funding
plugins.description: AWS funding — MAP, POC credits, WAFR credits, MDF, Activate, BOX feasibility. Funding checked before every SOW.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-intelligence
plugins.description: Market intel — company research, sector analysis, competitor map, buying signals, account intelligence.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-ops
plugins.description: Operations — health score, MSP reporting, renewal playbook, churn detection, partner scorecard, orchestrator.

plugins.name: cloudiqus-agent-bakery
plugins.description: Agent Bakery GTM — AgentCore architecture, Quick Suite catalogue, POC motion, StoreFront, governance, pricing.
